signals.headline: TRUMP NOMINATES KEVIN WARSH TO SUCCEED JEROME POWELL AS FED CHAIR** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
TRUMP NOMINATES KEVIN WARSH TO SUCCEED JEROME POWELL AS FED CHAIR** | YES | HIGH  
President Trump announced Kevin Warsh as his pick to replace Jerome Powell, whose term ends in May, ending months of speculation in a Truth Social post reported in January 2026[1][2]. Warsh, a former Fed governor, faces a Senate confirmation hearing with potential resistance over Fed independence amid a DOJ probe of
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Bitcoin Price Plunges 50% from October 2025 Peak Toward $60,000 Amid Massive Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Price Plunges 50% from October 2025 Peak Toward $60,000 Amid Massive Liquidations | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin has crashed through key support levels to around $64,000 as of Thursday, down nearly 50% from its October 2025 all-time high above $126,000, marking one of its largest historical drawdowns.[1][2]  
Over $1.1 billion in leveraged long positions were liquidated in the past 24
